stormbreaker-rifle-squad.lore: The Stormbreaker Rifle Squad represents Exor Panzer's baseline infantry, equipped with enhanced combat armour featuring alert sensors and self-repair capability. Absolutely essential human personnel are deployed in elite units clad in advanced combat armour from Exor's extensive personnel arms catalogue.

stormbreaker-heavy-laser-squad.flavor: "A laser crew in Stormbreaker armour. They dig in and burn anything that moves." — Exor Panzer infantry weapons catalogue
stormbreaker-heavy-laser-squad.lore: The Stormbreaker Heavy Laser Squad carries crew-served laser weapons in Exor's enhanced combat armour. Though cumbersome, their ability to dig in and deliver sustained energy weapon fire makes them a formidable defensive asset that can threaten light vehicles and walkers.

stormbreaker-gatling-squad.flavor: "Volume of fire from an entrenched position. The Gatling Squad suppresses everything in its arc." — Exor Panzer infantry doctrine manual
stormbreaker-gatling-squad.lore: The Stormbreaker Gatling Squad carries man-portable gatling weapons in Exor's combat armour. Their sustained fire capability from dug-in positions makes them excellent area denial troops, capable of suppressing advancing forces and protecting flanks against any opposition.

stormbreaker-sniper-squad.flavor: "Active camouflage and a railgun. The Sniper Squad kills what it sees, and it sees everything." — Exor Panzer special weapons division
stormbreaker-sniper-squad.lore: The Stormbreaker Sniper Squad combines active camouflage with a squad-served railgun, creating an invisible long-range threat. Exor's enhanced armour allows them to dig in and remain hidden while delivering precision kinetic strikes against high-value targets at extreme range.

stormbreaker-missile-squad.flavor: "Infantry-portable indirect fire in Stormbreaker armour. They lob warheads from behind cover all day long." — Exor Panzer missile systems catalogue
stormbreaker-missile-squad.lore: The Stormbreaker Missile Squad carries man-portable missile launchers in Exor's combat armour, providing infantry-portable indirect fire capability. Their ability to dig in and deliver sustained missile fire makes them a persistent threat that is difficult to locate and suppress.

stormbreaker-jump-infantry.flavor: "Jump jets in Stormbreaker armour. They leap over walls, land behind you, and open fire before you turn around." — Exor Panzer assault infantry brief
stormbreaker-jump-infantry.lore: The Stormbreaker Jump Infantry represents Exor's air-mobile assault troops, equipped with jump jets and enhanced combat armour. Their ability to bypass terrain obstacles and strike from unexpected angles makes them ideal for urban operations and rapid flanking manoeuvres.

stormbreaker-expeditionary-squad.flavor: "Satellite lock and alert sensors in the hands of infantry. The Expeditionary Squad sees the bigger picture." — Exor Panzer forward operations doctrine
stormbreaker-expeditionary-squad.lore: The Stormbreaker Expeditionary Squad combines satellite targeting with enhanced sensors, serving as forward air controllers and target designators. They dig in at observation points and feed precision targeting data to heavier assets, multiplying the effectiveness of every gun in the battlegroup.

dobermann-squad.flavor: "Active camouflage on Marstech infantry. You'll never see them until it's too late." — Kasei-No Okami infantry operations manual
dobermann-squad.lore: The Dobermann Squad is Marstech Corp's elite infantry unit, equipped with active camouflage and rapid mobility. Born from Martian necessity where small numbers must compensate with superior technology, Dobermann squads are the premier reconnaissance infantry of the Red Planet.

praetorian-power-armor-squad.flavor: "Power armour not unlike miniature Hardbots, allowing them to keep up with their bigger cousins and tanks." — Universal Encyclopedia, Canal 2225 Edition
praetorian-power-armor-squad.lore: The Praetorian Power Armor Squad is Exor Panzer's heavy infantry, equipped with power suits that blur the line between trooper and walker. Their XMG and active camouflage make them formidable opponents, representing the cutting edge of human military evolution in the Hardwar era.

cyclone-power-armour-squad.flavor: "Marstech power armour with a railgun. The Cyclone squad hits harder than most light vehicles." — Marstech Corp infantry systems division
cyclone-power-armour-squad.lore: The Cyclone Power Armour Squad is Marstech Corp's heavy infantry, equipped with railgun-armed power suits and rapid mobility. Their advanced Martian engineering allows them to keep pace with hover tanks, providing infantry support in environments too dangerous for conventional troops.

nephilim-power-armour-squad.flavor: "Jump packs, plasma accelerators, and Anansi's AI targeting. The Nephilim fall from the sky like angels of war." — African Federation military showcase
nephilim-power-armour-squad.lore: The Nephilim Power Armour Squad is Anansi Combine's elite jump infantry, equipped with plasma accelerators and jump packs. Named after the Biblical giants, they represent the African Federation's investment in combining cutting-edge combat software with the best human operators available.

shuriken.flavor: "Dual weapons, gunnery control, and bracing mass on heavy infantry. Shinobi's Shuriken squads are walking weapon platforms." — Pacific Rim Hardwar analysis
shuriken.lore: The Shuriken is Shinobi Solutions' heavy weapons infantry squad, equipped with dual weapons and gunnery control that rival light walkers. Their bracing mass allows sustained fire from dug-in positions, making them exceptionally dangerous static defence troops favoured by Pacific Rim operators.

auto-cannon-turret.flavor: "Automated, alert, and always ready. The auto cannon turret never sleeps and never misses its shift." — Generic turret procurement guide
auto-cannon-turret.lore: Auto cannon turrets are widely available static defence emplacements, combining gatling and XMG capability with alert sensors. They provide automated perimeter defence for bases, outposts, and critical infrastructure across the Hardwar-era world.

plasma-turret.flavor: "Plasma and gatling fire from a fixed emplacement. Anything that enters the kill zone doesn't leave." — Static defence installation manual
plasma-turret.lore: Plasma turrets mount energy weapons on fixed defensive positions, combining plasma accelerator and gatling fire for devastating area denial. They are a common sight protecting corporate enclaves, military installations, and the new cities built to house Flood refugees.

rocket-launcher-turret.flavor: "Anti-aircraft rockets on a turret mount. Nothing flies over this position without permission." — Air defence installation guide
rocket-launcher-turret.lore: Rocket launcher turrets provide static indirect fire and anti-aircraft defence from fixed positions. Their combination of ground bombardment and air denial capability makes them essential components of any prepared defensive position in modern Hardwar.

rail-gun-turret.flavor: "Railgun and laser on a fixed mount. The kill zone extends to the horizon." — Heavy defence emplacement specifications
rail-gun-turret.lore: Rail gun turrets mount the heaviest available energy and kinetic weapons on static defensive platforms. Their devastating firepower can engage targets at extreme range, making them the centrepiece of fortified positions that must hold against heavy assault.

standard-energy-barrier.flavor: "A wall of energy that stops bullets and bodies. Simple, reliable, and essential." — Defensive engineering field manual
standard-energy-barrier.lore: Standard energy barriers are basic static defence emplacements that project energy fields to block movement and projectiles. Widely available and inexpensive, they provide the fundamental building blocks of any prepared defensive position in the Hardwar era.

military-energy-barrier.flavor: "Military-grade barriers with defence mesh integration. Breaching one means facing the full network." — Military engineering specifications
military-energy-barrier.lore: Military energy barriers are enhanced static defences featuring defence mesh integration that links multiple barriers into a coordinated defensive network. They provide significantly greater protection than standard barriers, forming the backbone of military fortifications and corporate security perimeters.
